picks.analysis: INTU scores +18 — a Strong Call recommendation. The bullish read is led by Fundamentals (+7), reinforced by Narrative (+7). The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +18.0%), Streak (+2, 3d green). Cutting the other way: MACD (-1, -6.59). Within Technology we gave INTU a +18 and DELL a +17 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take INTU calls over DELL calls, mainly on Fundamentals (+7 vs +5) and Narrative (+7 vs +6). The suggested calls sit ~12.6% OTM with 48d to expiry, delta 0.31, mid $10.95 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.

The biggest contributors are Positive Catalyst (+3, bullish), Guidance (+2, +7.7%), Streak (+2, 3d green). Cutting the other way: Support/Resistance (-1, ±1.4% to R), Short Interest % (-1, 1.1%). Within Industrials we gave GD a +16 and FDX a +13 — same direction, lower conviction — which is why we'd take GD calls over FDX calls, mainly on Narrative (+6 vs +4) and Technicals (+3 vs +2). The suggested calls sit ~6.1% OTM with 83d to expiry, delta 0.36, mid $8.15 — well inside the 5-30% OTM / Δ 0.20-0.40 / ≤$35 premium / standard-monthly criteria.
